name: crm_data_sync
description: Performs full CRM customer data synchronization, runs daily at 20:00
action: Execute full CRM customer data synchronization
notes: SQL query was modified after last Friday's deployment. New query logic: SELECT * FROM customers JOIN orders ON customers.id = orders.customer_id WHERE sync_status = 'pending'. This query has no index added, posing a full table scan risk.

execution_history.notes: Ran for 75 minutes before being manually terminated by DBA (21:30 kill process). Process was holding 300+ database connections, causing connection pool exhaustion.
Old query logic, completed normally, took 3 minutes

name: database_backup
description: Performs incremental database backup daily at 03:00

name: monitoring_alerts
description: Checks system health metrics every 5 minutes and triggers alerts
action: Check system health metrics (API latency, DB connections, error rates)
notes: Ran normally during the outage, triggered all alerts on time

execution_history.notes: Triggered API timeout alert: multiple endpoints P99 > 5s
Triggered database connection alert: connection pool utilization 100%

name: log_rotation
description: Performs log rotation and compression daily at 01:00
action: Execute log file rotation and compression archival
